description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with a complex, multi-gabled roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored stone or brick, giving it a sturdy and upscale appearance. Several dormer windows punctuate the roofline, adding architectural interest and natural light to the interior. The front facade includes a prominent covered entryway with decorative timber accents and a small porch area. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and smaller, grouped windows. The overall design suggests a blend of Craftsman and Ranch architectural styles, with a focus on horizontal lines and a welcoming, residential character.
description: A large, single-story house with a dark, multi-gabled roof and light stone exterior, featuring dormer windows and a covered entryway with timber accents.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entryway with its covered porch, decorative timber accents, and the expansive, multi-gabled roof.
description_view_1: From this angle, the side elevation reveals grouped windows and the depth of the house's layout, with the roof's complexity visible.
description_view_2: The rear view shows additional dormer windows, a long roofline, and more symmetrical window arrangements along the back wall.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the large picture windows and the extended wing of the house, as well as the intersecting roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with grouped and large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with decorative timber accents, steps, and a prominent overhang
